configurations.name: animaecore
runtimeArgs: SRC="$PWD"; DST='/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-vincenzograsso-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-Documents-11-ProgettiFrontEnd-AnimaECore/64ef5ca1-5297-4f96-b199-fbcf0e123300/scratchpad/site'; mkdir -p "$DST/img"; cp -f "$SRC"/index.html "$SRC"/style.css "$SRC"/script.js "$DST"/ 2>/dev/null; cp -f "$SRC"/img/* "$DST/img"/ 2>/dev/null; cd "$DST" && python3 -m http.server 4815

configurations.name: jampy
runtimeArgs: SRC="$PWD/jampy"; DST='/private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-vincenzograsso-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-Documents-11-ProgettiFrontEnd-AnimaECore/e33fd5b9-960c-4f95-8b1f-b2f1ddc52a06/scratchpad/jampy'; mkdir -p "$DST"; cp -f "$SRC"/* "$DST"/ 2>/dev/null; cd "$DST" && python3 -m http.server 8734
